message:
🐛 Fix missing DCO sign-off in mission generation workflows (#878)

Three places were creating commits without DCO sign-off (Signed-off-by):

1. platform-install-gen.yml: git commit missing -s flag
2. build-index.yml: git commit missing -s flag
3. generate-cncf-missions.mjs: GitHub Contents API commits had no
   Signed-off-by trailer and no explicit author/committer fields,
   causing all CNCF mission PRs to fail the DCO check

Fixes: add -s flag to workflow git commits, and add Signed-off-by
trailer + explicit committer/author to API-created commits.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -39,5 +39,5 @@ jobs:
           git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
           git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
           git add solutions/index.json
-          git commit -m "🌱 Auto-update mission index"
+          git commit -s -m "🌱 Auto-update mission index"
           git push

@@ -225,7 +225,7 @@ jobs:
           git add solutions/platform-install/ solutions/index.json
           git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
           git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
-          git commit -m "✨ Platform install mission generation $(date +%Y-%m-%d)
+          git commit -s -m "✨ Platform install mission generation $(date +%Y-%m-%d)
 
           Generated $NEW_COUNT platform install missions.
           Includes managed K8s services, distributions, and cluster operators."
